tool.name: LDNe : correction for pseudoreplication

param.name: input_data
param.label: Upload your LDNe table
param.help: Tab-delimited and contain a colum named NeLD.

param.name: nb_chrom
param.label: Number of chromosomes pair
param.help: The number of chromosomes pairs of the studied species used for pseudoreplication correction.

tool.help:
Usage ===== As input, the user provides a table containing a NeLD column.
The tool computes a correction from pseudoreplication using the following equation (Waples *et al.* 2016):
.. math::
Ne_{corrected} = \frac{Ne_{LD}}{0.098 + 0.219 \times \log(C)}
where *C* is the number of chromosome pairs.
The output file is a table with the LDNe_corrected column added.
Example of input file
+----------+------+-------------+--------+-------+------+-------+------------+----------+ | Dataset | Pop | Marker_type | Subset | Loci | MAF | NeLD | JK_CI_down | JK_CI_up | +==========+======+=============+========+=======+======+=======+============+==========+ | MyStudy | Pop1 | SNP | 1 | 1200 | 0.02 | 450.2 | 380.1 | 560.4 | +----------+------+-------------+--------+-------+------+-------+------------+----------+ | MyStudy | Pop1 | SNP | 2 | 1150 | 0.05 | 435.0 | 370.5 | 510.2 | +----------+------+-------------+--------+-------+------+-------+------------+----------+

citations.citation: @Manual{dplyr, title = {dplyr: A Grammar of Data Manipulation}, author = {Hadley Wickham and Romain François and Lionel Henry and Kirill Müller and Davis Vaughan and Posit Software, PBC}, year = {2016}, note = {R package version 0.5.0}, doi = {10.32614/CRAN.package.dplyr}, url = {https://dplyr.tidyverse.org}, publisher = {Comprehensive R Archive Network (CRAN)}, }

@article{Waples2016_mec13814, author = {Waples, Robin S.}, title = {Making sense of genetic estimates of effective population size}, journal = {Molecular Ecology}, year = {2016}, volume = {25}, number = {19}, pages = {4689--4691}, doi = {10.1111/mec.13814}, }
